project.name: TiiBnTick — tnt-legacy-documents-core
project.description:
L4 Business — Kernel billing-legacy-documents-controller gateway: opaque JSON proxy toward the Yowyob Kernel's generic commercial-document HTTP surface (bons de commande/achat/livraison, factures fournisseurs/proforma, bons de réception, notes de crédit — 64 operations across 7 document types, see docs/kernel-api/endpoints.md, lines 4224-4702). No business logic or persistence of its own.
Coexistence ADR (docs/audits/remediation/workstream-payment-billing-kernel-delegation.md, Option B, decided 2026-07-18): this module is deliberately separate from tnt-billing-invoice, which remains the system of record for TiiBnTick's own mission billing (TNT-FACT-* numbering, PDF, credit notes) — this proxy is only for generic commercial-document needs (internal purchases, supplier delivery notes for tnt-inventory-core/tnt-accounting-core). It must never be used as a substitute for, or gain a dependency edge to/from, tnt-billing-invoice.
Layer L4 — Business (a module legitimately consumed by other L4 modules — tnt-inventory-core, tnt-accounting-core — must itself stay at L4 or below per the strict layering rule in the root CLAUDE.md). Author: MANFOUO Braun.
